Name: 2_Advanced
Representative_Docs: ["Available blind spot detection is designed to alert you when there's a vehicle in your blind spot before you change lanes. An available rear cross traffic alert helps warn you if cars are approaching from the side when reversing out of a parking space. Available automatic emergency braking with pedestrian detection can warn the driver of a potential collision ahead.", 'Additionally, the standard Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross Traffic Alert and Safe Exit Alert are designed to help warn drivers if a vehicle has entered a blind spot, while the available Front and Rear Parking Assist with Automatic Braking and Panoramic View Monitor are designed to help drivers maneuver in tight spaces.', "These active safety suites include advanced features like a Pre-Collision System with Pedestrian Detection, Lane Departure Alert with Steering Assist, Automatic High Beams, Full Speed Range Dynamic Radar Cruise Control, Lane Tracing Assist, and Road Sign Assist. Plus, available features like Blind Spot Monitor with Rear Cross-Traffic Alert, front and rear parking assist with automatic braking, and a panoramic view monitor helps see what's surrounding the vehicle, especially in tight spaces. Thanks to its expansive lineup, RAV4 has mass appeal."]

Name: 4_Hyundai
Representative_Docs: ["As a critical pillar in Hyundai's electrification strategy, IONIQ 5 introduces our first dedicated battery electric platform, the eGMP, or Electric Global Modular Platform. We are thrilled to introduce you to Hyundai's first ever IONIQ 5. Ladies and gentlemen, this is why it's my great pleasure to introduce the 2017 Hyundai IONIQ model lineup. Introducing the 2017 Hyundai IONIQ Plug-in Hybrid, the Hyundai IONIQ Hybrid, and the IONIQ Electric.", "Let's just say it. Let's put it out there. What makes Hyundai IONIQ stand out?"]

Name: 5_Kia
Representative_Docs: ["And on behalf of KIA India, I'm absolutely thrilled and honored to welcome you this afternoon. Today, I will take you to a futuristic world that has innovation leading us to a sustainable future, a world that we are all extremely proud of, a world of the KIA EV6. Now, before we deep dive into the Kia EV6, it's important to understand Kia's plan for a sustainable future.", "I'm pleased to announce that with the Kia EV6, we will demonstrate and provide a new level of experience through our engineering strength. We truly believe that the Kia EV6 is an embodiment of the new Kia. Now, I would like to go over some of the finer nuances of the Kia EV6, beginning with the most important one, the electrifying performance on offer.", 'Kia India is developing an India-centric EV in Albi home ground up to be launched by 2025. We are starting our EV journey in India by launching nothing but the best from Kia, the EV6. Our globally-awarded EV6 is the most exciting and sophisticated product from Kia yet.']

The launch of the new Nissan LEAF comes when the entire world is shifting toward era of EV.', 'The new Nissan LEAF represents technological Nissan or Nissan of Technology, which is a traditional term associated with Nissan in Japanese language, and this is definitely a great opportunity of which we intend to make the most. The new Nissan Leaf will drive the Nissan Intelligent Mobility forward.']

Name: 9_Inf

All in all, you can control MBUX not only by this touchscreen, but by the touch control buttons and via voice control.", "We've removed 40% of the buttons from the center console and transferred these functions to a menu on the large screen above the center console, where these functions can now be accessed. Of course, supplemented with options for controlling the new functions. The instrument cluster features two 7-inch displays coupled with the traditional mechanical rev speed indicator in the center.", 'The Mercedes-Benz User Experience, or MBUX for short, is amazing in that it comes with four different control options. The touchpad in the center console, the touch screen in the middle display, touch control buttons on the steering wheel, or simply by voice. Hey Mercedes.']

Name: 18_Toyota
Representative_Docs: ["Stay tuned to learn more about Prius Prime later in the video, but for now, let's find out more about Prius. The latest Prius generation offers six distinct takes on the hybrid experience. First, L-Eco boasts the best fuel efficiency of the entire Prius lineup, while also having the lowest starting price.", "And whether you prefer Prius LE AWD E's off-road utility or Prius Prime's electric capabilities, there's no shortage of reasons why the Prius family is home to the world's most iconic hybrids. Both Prius and Prius Prime are offered at an approachable starting price, with a strong track record for long-term cost estimates and overall resale value. Factor in the two-year, 25,000-mile ToyotaCare no-cost maintenance plan with enhanced three-year roadside assistance, as well as exceptional hybrid warranty coverage.", "Add in that every new Prius Prime includes ToyotaCare, which provides 2 years or 25,000 miles of scheduled maintenance, along with enhanced 3-year unlimited mileage of 24-hour roadside assistance, as well as exceptional hybrid warranty coverage like the 10-year, 150,000-mile Hybrid Battery Warranty. And it's easy to see how Prius Prime is ready to take the lead. Learn more today at toyota.com slash Prius Prime."]

Name: 24_Vehicle
Representative_Docs: ['The 21-inch Cayenne sport wheels provide accuracy when steering and stability when quartering at speed. Another special standard feature on the new Cayenne GTS is Porsche Active Suspension Management PASM combined with steel spring suspension. The benefits are lighter weight and a perfect road setup, whatever the road conditions.', "What I'm really pleased to say it's a mission we've absolutely delivered on with Artura weighing just 1498 kilos DIN and just 1395 kilos DR. We've retained our hydraulic steering system for the best possible feedback. This is matched with an all-new stiff suspension system. It really maximises control of the contact patch and this is paired with our proactive damping control to provide absolute fantastic body control but without compromising ride comfort.", "We've retained our hydraulic steering system for the best possible feedback This is matched with an all-new stiff suspension system. It really maximises control of the contact patch and this is paired with our proactive damping control to provide absolute fantastic body control but without compromising ride comfort. Name: 25_Toyota
Representative_Docs: ["And thanks to its compact design, the Camry all-wheel drive grades are comparable with the front-wheel drive models when it comes to passenger space, cargo capacity, ride comfort, and agility. Plus, Camry's available all-wheel drive doesn't come at the cost of performance. For instance, Camry XSE All-Wheel Drive's 205 horsepower easily outpowers midsize alternatives like the Nissan Altima.", "Camry's cabin not only offers a striking design, but also a good deal of comfort and convenience offerings, like highly adjustable front seats on all grades, SofTex-trimmed sport seating on SE grades, and leather-trimmed seating on XLE and XSE grades. And like its exterior, Camry TRD's interior is far from subtle, featuring red contrast stitching and accents. a unique MID startup animation, and TRD accessories and logos throughout.", "Meanwhile, Camry TRD's purposeful features also dish out head-turning looks, with 19-inch TRD matte black wheels that reduce unsprung weight, and a gloss black aero kit with a raised black rear spoiler that improves high-speed stability. Inside Camry, the spacious, driver-oriented interior is designed for functionality and style, but also offers a great deal of comfort and convenience, starting with the soft-text-trimmed sports seating on SE grades and leather-trimmed seating on XLE and XSE grades."]

Name: 26_Toyota
Representative_Docs: ["For better on-road handling, RAV4 also has that covered thanks to a standard sport-tuned suspension on the Hybrid SE and Hybrid XSE grades. What's more, RAV4 has three available all-wheel drive systems, including Dynamic Torque Vectoring All-Wheel Drive on the TRD Off-Road, Limited and Adventure grades, as well as Electronic On-Demand All-Wheel Drive on Hybrid EV and Prime Plug-in Hybrid EV grades.", "Next, there are two gas-exclusive options, Adventure and TRD Off-Road, both showcasing RAV4's rugged side. Similarly, the hybrid line of RAV4 sees the return of Hybrid SE and Hybrid XSE, and for 2023, the all-new Hybrid Woodland Edition, the first hybrid grade with an off-road focus. All told, this fifth-generation RAV4 family consists of 17 different options, or 90, counting the two plug-in hybrid grades of the related RAV4 Prime model.", "And with improved power and fuel economy, the RAV4 Hybrid is defying expectations. And now, let's just do it again. The 2021 RAV4 Prime is the most powerful RAV4 ever."]

Limited Nightshade and Platinum grades elevate the multimedia experience even higher with an 11-speaker JBL premium audio system. while five USB ports, and a standard Qi-compatible wireless charger keeps mobile devices charged on long trips.", "Prius Prime also includes trials to Toyota's line of connected services, including Safety Connect, Service Connect, Remote Connect, Wi-Fi Connect, and Drive Connect. which includes cloud navigation, destination assist, and intelligent assistant. On the other hand, an available 8-speaker JBL Premium audio system plays tunes with vivid clarity, while six USB-C ports and available slotted Qi-compatible wireless charging keep mobile devices charged on long road trips."]

Name: 46_EV
Representative_Docs: ['One is the high-density lithium-ion battery, which is a requirement of electric vehicles. Each of the eight modules weighs approximately 55 pounds for easy shipping and storage.", "cars you know the battery race continues here you are breaking away with lithium iron yeah it's the same family of chemistry in the lithium chemistry but we're using lithium iron instead of lithium ion or lithium ion phosphate so we give up a little bit of power density but it's a much safer battery pack we don't have runaway thermal issues if you'll remember a few years ago there were laptop computers that were catching on fire that was the lithium ion chemistry because they continue to be used today yeah and if If you have a proper cooling system, you're fine."]

Name: 55_Reg
Representative_Docs: ['The e-pedal allows you to start decelerate and hold the car with just one pedal. So when you want to accelerate it you just tip into the accelerator pedal and when you want to slow down you lift off and slowly lift off and it will start springing the vehicle to a stop. Representative_Docs: ["And if you're looking for a really cool feature that can make a really big difference in your day, look no further than Hyundai Digital Key 2 Touch, where you can actually unlock your door and start your motor all by using your smartphone, no key fob required. Place it next to the door to unlock it, use it to turn on the engine, and you can even share it with friends and family members by sending your digital key to their Android smartphone.', 'You push this button on the key fob, it can pull directly in and reverse out of a parking spot, perfect for tight places. Hyundai Digital Key, allowing you to transform your smartphone into a key fob or you can use this digital key card. place it next to the door to unlock, use it to start up the vehicle, and you can even share your digital key with a friend or a family member to their Android smartphone device.']
